title: atractylis lanata
intro: Atractylis lanata, also known as Yarroway or Woolly Milkwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Atractylis lanata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antibacterial agent. Atractylis lanata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide a range of therapeutic benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
